_meta.description: Reusable test claims for validating the fact-checking pipeline. Each claim has an expected classification range to track consistency across model/provider changes.

claims.notes: Well-known false claim. Should be classified as False with high confidence.

claims.claim: O Brasil foi o primeiro país a adotar a urna eletrônica em eleições nacionais
claims.notes: Brazil was a pioneer but not strictly 'first' depending on definition. Tests nuanced classification. May return Unverifiable if web search doesn't find definitive sources.

claims.claim: COVID-19 vaccines contain microchips for tracking people
claims.notes: Well-known conspiracy theory. Should be classified as False.

claims.claim: A Amazônia produz 20% do oxigênio do mundo
claims.notes: Common claim that oversimplifies — Amazon's net O2 contribution is debated. Tests Exaggerated/Misleading detection.

claims.claim: A prefeitura de São Paulo abriu licitação para compra de uniformes escolares em 2024
claims.notes: Tests gazette pipeline with a plausible municipal procurement claim.

claims.claim: O município de Curitiba publicou decreto sobre restrições de circulação durante a pandemia
claims.notes: High-probability gazette hit — COVID decrees were widely published.
